race.comment: MARACOURT (7) exploded first-up at Oakbank when missing by a head and looks perfectly placed rising to the mile. Gets the switch to J Melham and he can go one better. SCANDALIZE (10) is impossible to ignore after making it two on the bounce here last start. He's clearly worked it all out now and only needs to hold that level to be right in the thick of it again. PUDDING (5) was a tough winner fresh before failing to fire in the City of Adelaide, but he can bounce back third-up. CHICAGO STORM (1) is as genuine as they come and has been solid without threatening in two runs back. He carries the big weight but that rarely bothers him. FINE FUTURE (8) held off the fast-finishing MARACOURT at Oakbank and is open to further improvement, though the inside draw could get sticky. If the gaps appear, he'll be bursting through late.
